StrmTool.PluginDescription: Extracts technical media information (codec, resolution, subtitles) from strm files to enhance library display and playback performance.
StrmTool.TaskDescription: Extracts technical media information (codec, resolution, subtitles) from strm files.
StrmTool.BackupTaskDescription: Backs up media stream information from strm items to cache files, skips files with existing cache, and probes remote media when stream info is missing.
StrmTool.LblEnableAutoExtract: Automatically extract media info for new strm files
StrmTool.DescEnableAutoExtract: When enabled, new strm files will automatically extract media info in the background without manual task execution
StrmTool.DescEnableMediaInfoCache: When enabled, extracted media info will be saved to xxx.strmtool.json files to avoid repeated probing
StrmTool.DescRefreshDelay: Milliseconds to wait after each media info refresh to avoid overwhelming remote servers
StrmTool.DescMaxConcurrentExtract: Maximum number of concurrent media info extraction tasks
StrmTool.RestartWarning: Important: All changes require a Jellyfin server restart to take full effect.
StrmTool.DescForceRefreshIgnoreExisting: When enabled, will always execute refresh regardless of whether media stream info already exists (cache can still be used)
StrmTool.DescForceRefreshIgnoreCache: When enabled, will always fetch from remote server directly, ignoring cache files (will still check if media streams exist)
